contents:
This banana mod is a compact scene detail for King Kong and similar jungle-themed layouts where a small color accent makes the playfield feel more complete. It is designed as a quick visual upgrade, not a mechanical change.
Choose Yellow for a classic look or Luminous for more contrast under cabinet and room lighting. The part is resin, lightweight and easy to position.
Product Features Small scenic accent for King Kong and jungle-themed playfields. Available in Yellow or Luminous. Resin body with low weight. Fast placement with no tools required.
title: King Kong Banana Mod

contents:
This barrel with banana is a scene-building mod for King Kong and other jungle-themed machines where you want one stronger focal prop on the playfield. It adds visual story without requiring a larger rebuild.
The piece is handpainted and built from resin and PETG. It is compact, easy to place and intended as a premium visual accent.
Product Features Handpainted barrel-and-banana scene prop. Designed for King Kong and related jungle themes. Made from resin and PETG. Tool-free placement.
title: King Kong Barrel with Banana Mod

contents:
This set is made for owners who want more depth on tropical and jungle playfields without changing core mechs or doing complex installs. It adds visual layering in areas that otherwise look flat or empty.
You get five trees and three mounting options, so you can spread them across the playfield or cluster them around one scene depending on space and theme.
Product Features Set of 5 palm trees. 3 mounting options for layout flexibility. Built for tropical, jungle and island-themed machines. Lightweight scene upgrade without mechanical modification.
title: Pinball Palm Tree Mod Set

contents:
This replacement gong is made for Stern King Kong machines where the stock part feels visually light compared to the rest of the playfield. The goal is simple: a gong that looks more in scale with the machine theme.
The part is printed in PETG, finished by hand and delivered with mounting hardware for a direct swap. Installation is quick if you are already comfortable with basic playfield part changes.
Product Features Direct replacement gong for Stern King Kong. PETG base part with hand-painted finish details. Mounting hardware included in the box. Straight swap installation, no complex wiring (installation instructions are provided). Built to give the playfield a fuller, more theme-consistent look.
title: King Kong Gong Replacement

contents:
This is the warm-finish version of the 64x128 display, built for game rooms where a softer, furniture-like housing fits better than a machined metal look. The screen behavior stays powerful, but the enclosure blends more naturally into home setups.
It works well next to wood trims, classic cabinets and mixed pinball/arcade environments. Configuration is handled through the web interface, with firmware updates available when needed.
Built-in Display Functions Marquee mode: scrolling text for machine names and room labels. Clock mode: clean standby time display. VU meter: sound-reactive meter effect. Game of Life: ambient animation mode. Playback controls: mode switching and behavior adjustments from the web interface. Product Features 64x128 LED matrix format. Handmade wooden housing with a warmer visual character. Web-based setup and controls. API support for external integrations. Firmware update support. Best for arcade and pinball rooms where materials and finish matter as much as function.
title: Dot Matrix Display 64x128 - Handmade Wood Edition

contents:
This is the industrial version of the 64x128 display, built for setups where the enclosure should look as intentional as the electronics. The CNC housing gives straight edges, tighter panel lines and a cleaner technical look than the wood edition.
It fits best in pinball and arcade rooms with machined or metal-forward styling. Setup runs through the web interface, so you can switch modes and adjust behavior without reopening the housing.
Built-in Display Functions Marquee mode: scrolling text for machine names, room labels or short announcements. Clock mode: always-on time display for standby setups. VU meter: audio-reactive meter behavior. Game of Life: ambient animation mode. Playback controls: switch and configure display modes from the web interface. Product Features 64x128 LED matrix format. CNC-machined enclosure with a rigid, industrial finish. Web-based configuration and control. API support for custom integrations. Firmware update support for long-term maintainability. Built for arcade and pinball setups where enclosure quality matters.
title: Dot Matrix Display 64x128 - Industrial CNC Edition

contents:
This topper is built specifically for Pulp Fiction owners who want the backbox to feel like part of the machine theme, not an unrelated add-on. The Jack Rabbit Slim’s dance scene is painted on the rear side of the glass to create visible depth when lit.
The LED frame reacts to game audio and room sound, so the piece stays lively even when the machine is idle between games. Installation is straightforward and works with either J109 power or a standard 5V USB supply.
Product Features Theme-specific artwork based on the Jack Rabbit Slim’s dance scene. Rear-side hand-painted glass for a stronger depth effect. Sound-reactive LED behavior for active visual response. Two power routes: J109 or 5V USB. Built for Pulp Fiction (CGC) setups and themed game rooms. Plug-and-play installation flow.
title: Pulp Fiction Topper - Jack Rabbit Slim's Dance

contents:
Add your own text and choose the two-color combination you want. The gallery updates while you switch colors, so you can see the version you are ordering.
This keychain works well for pinball keys, workshop keys or as a small gift for another owner. It is simple, but it does not have to look generic.
Product Features Add up to 10 characters of custom text Choose from multiple two-color combinations Preview updates while you change colors Metal keyring included 3D-printed in PLA
title: Personalized Flipper Keychain

contents: Deze admin pagina genereert promotieteksten voor alle producten in de shop.
title: Promotion Text Builder
